before_model.pattern: MVC controller with injected services (CustomerController + UserController)
before_model.user_creation: multi-step: validate email → create user → assign default roles → add profile access → send password email
before_model.role_management: additive-only SetUserRoleAccess with roleId list — no replace semantics
before_model.reactivation: no explicit reactivate endpoint — DeletedAt set to null manually
before_model.authorization: scattered IsProtectedUser checks inline in controller actions
before_model.tenant_isolation: customerId passed as query param — no structural enforcement

after_model.pattern: Vertical slice per behavior — Handler + Endpoint + SQL per feature
after_model.user_creation: one-step CreateCustomerUser: validate → insert → assign roles → insert membership — all in one transaction
after_model.role_management: replace-semantics SetUserRoleAccess: delete scoped roles + re-insert — idempotent
after_model.reactivation: explicit ReactivateUser handler with dedicated SQL (sets DeletedAt = NULL, IsActive = 1)
after_model.authorization: IPermissionService gate in handler — uniform, not inline
after_model.tenant_isolation: CustomerId from ICurrentUser — not passed as param

design_decisions.decision: Replace additive role assignment with replace-semantics (delete + re-insert)
design_decisions.reason: sms-service had race condition risk with additive model — replace is idempotent and predictable

design_decisions.decision: Combine all CreateUser sub-steps into single CreateCustomerUser handler with 5 SQL files
design_decisions.reason: sms-service scattered user creation across 4+ service methods — one-step handler eliminates partial-create risk

design_decisions.decision: Promote reactivation to explicit first-class behavior (ReactivateUser handler)
design_decisions.reason: sms-service had no explicit reactivate — only soft-delete with manual null-set. Explicit intent is clearer.

simplifications.removed: Password email send on user creation
simplifications.reason: green-ai uses identity_access domain for auth flows — password setup is out of scope for customer_administration

simplifications.removed: SAML2 SSO user provisioning path from CreateUser
simplifications.reason: SSO handled by identity_access domain — customer_administration creates managed users only

transformations: BEH_001 GetCustomerUsers → GetUsers handler (enhanced: IsLockedOut + WHERE DeletedAt IS NULL)
BEH_NEW GetProfileRoles → new behavior (no equivalent in sms-service — green-ai profile model)
BEH_NEW GetCustomerLogs → GetCustomerLogs handler (dual: user logs + system logs)
removed_concepts: Additive role assignment (replaced by idempotent replace-semantics)
verdict: REDESIGNED — no 1:1 copy. Replace-semantics, one-step create, explicit reactivate, IPermissionService gate. Explainable without sms-service reference.
